proposition: ZenX Capital, a.s. (IČO 09289127; Zdeněk Sluka is a member of its správní rada since 2020 per the primary register) has been Able.cz s.r.o.'s largest shareholder since 14 October 2020: 50.0 % (2020–2023), 47.5 % (2023–2024), 48.2 % (2024–2025), and 45.80 % since 29 July 2025.
shortTitle: ZenX Capital, a.s. (IČO 09289127; Zdeněk Sluka is a member of its…
statusExplanation: Přímo doloženo primárním/oficiálním zdrojem (např. přímý výpis rejstříku nebo zakládaná listina).
note: The mirror-based pass recorded ZenX as one flat vklad among others and missed the scale of the holding entirely.

sources.title: ARES — official REST API, basic + full public-register (VR) records for all 19 in-scope entities, preserved and hashed
